_comment: v7 BX schema (2026-04-26). HONEST GAP: BX naturally reaches only 3 shots without dev-hooks (menu/adventure-map/classic-empty). target_shot_count: 10, min_shot_count: 8 — capture.mjs WILL fail with MIN_SHOT_COUNT_NOT_MET until #72-#76 land combo / best-score / revive / adventure-themed seeds. Pass --comps 01,02,03 to capture only what's reachable for interim review; do NOT submit to App Store with 3 shots — that's a half-empty carousel. The blocker is real game-side work; not a brain workaround target. Per CLAUDE.md Step 8 v7 rule 15.
hook_order: combo-dopamine (WOAH that combo — mid-explosion x4) — BLOCKED on #72/#73
mastery (x8 MEGA combo with multiplier overlay) — BLOCKED on #72/#73

progression (adventure map with 45/90 + golden stars + theme) — BLOCKED on #72/#74
tension (revive countdown 3 + Revive/Skip pills) — BLOCKED on #72/#76

deferred_until_dev_hooks.comment: 5+ HERO shots blocked on mody-sahariar1/Bloxplode-Beta #72-#76 (capture-mode + state seeding). Without these, BX has 3 reachable shots — App Store / Play minimum but a HALF-EMPTY CAROUSEL per Sahil 2026-04-26. capture.mjs's MIN_SHOT_COUNT_NOT_MET enforcement will fail full BX runs until at least 5 more shots land via dev-hooks. DO NOT submit BX to stores until #72-#76 ship.
